abstract.text: How to create services, change the configuration and important type aliases.
How to connect to viDoc and interact with the device on a low level.
The messages received from viDoc and related model types.
How to discover and connect to Ntrip mountpoints.
How to receive coordinate and accuracy data from viDoc.
How to access and communicate with the laser module in viDoc.
How to read the iOS device’s surroundings and combine with GPS information.
How to record single points with increased accuracy.
How to decipher where and why VigramSDK failed.

inlineContent.text: VigramSDK is a library to connect your app to viDoc to retrieve location data and perform laser distance recordings.

abstract.text: A SinglePoint is the result of a single point recording, where a certain position is recorded over a given duration.
NtripServiceError contains custom failure events when connecting to Ntrip services.
The configuration for the laser module of a viDoc peripheral.
Elevation value for Filter GNSS Constel lation system currently using in navigation
RequestError contains custom failure events when create request.
NMEAMessage is a protocol with all NMEA-0183 message types conforming to.
Messages about satellite (viDoc config) sent from the viDoc itself.
A Publisher that never emits a failure event.
The quality of the currently provided location data.
Use a LaserService to start laser distance recording sessions with a given configuration.
A GGAMessage is used for location data and correction information.
A GPSCoordinate containing latitude, longitude, referenceAltitude and geoidSeparation.
A NTRIP mountpoint to get RTK information from.
Time as specified in a NMEA-0183 message.
CoordinateCorrection specifies the correction of a raw antenna coordinate to the position that is observed in a given recording.
SinglePointRecordingService can be used to record single points over a given duration.
During the recording phase, the service will keep track of all the environment’s data and then merge individual measurements to one combined single point.
This guide shows you step by step how to update the Vigram SDK use SPM (Swift Package Manager) and resolve conflicts if its arise.
